---
name: java-quality-audit
description: Audit Java Lambda or EKS code for quality, security, resilience, observability, and test issues.
---

# Java Quality Audit Skill

## Required output
- `docs/ai/quality-audit.md`

## Every finding must include
- ID
- Severity: Critical / High / Medium / Low
- Category
- Evidence
- Why it matters
- Recommendation
- Safe autofix candidate: Yes / No

See `CHECKLIST.md`, `RULES.md`, and `REPORT_TEMPLATE.md`.
